## How it was tested

- [ ] `golangci-lint run` clean
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Manually verified against a Keenetic router / cluster (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Regenerated manifests (`make manifests generate`) if `api/*` changed
- [ ] Updated README / CHANGELOG if behaviour or config changed
- [ ] No secrets or router credentials committed
